title: UAE comes under Iranian attacks for second consecutive day — Jebel Ali port area targeted, IRGC denies
snippet: UAE Defence Ministry confirms second day of missile and drone attacks from Iran. Dubai residents report explosions in direction of Jebel Ali port, the largest and busiest harbour in the Middle East. UAE air defense systems intercepting ballistic missiles, cruise missiles, and drones. IRGC categorically denies attacks: 'have not carried out any missile or drone operations against the UAE in recent days' — calls reports 'absolutely denied and devoid of any truth.' No casualties confirmed from Day 2 attacks. Schools continue remote learning nationwide.
tag_reason: 5/5 UAE 2차 공격은 전일 푸자이라 공격과 다른 표적(제벨알리)이며, IRGC의 공식 부인이 추가된 새로운 전개
